name: property managers processing 5–15 payroll reports/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 payroll reports/month, manual report generation causes late compliance submissions. We automate report generation instead of manual report generation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in generating accurate payroll compliance reports on time.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Difficulty in generating accurate payroll compliance reports on time.
